text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing work, I head up to the roof and run
into Admire Vega and Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, good evening.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Another one.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. I come up here with Ayabe sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yep.
choice_data_list: The stars really are beautiful, huh.
The stars really are beautiful, huh.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You can see them so clearly tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time passes as we gaze up in silence at the starry
sky.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sure you can figure that out from my name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vega. It's a beautiful star that shines very
brightly.
choice_data_list: Remind me... What kind of star is Vega again?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's a first-magnitude star in the Lyra
constellation.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It forms the Summer Triangle with the stars Altair
and Deneb.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I guess so.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it also a famous part of the Tanabata
festival, where it's known as Orihime?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's right.
choice_data_list: And it's a romantic star, at that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And you can't talk about Orihime without
mentioning Hikoboshi.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You never know, Ayabe, maybe someday you'll
meet someone who can be the Hikoboshi to your
Orihime.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Or maybe you've already met them...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't know anyone like that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And I'm happy staying alone... forever and ever.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've been fine on my own so far. I don't need
anybody else.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But... ever since I arrived at the academy,
everyone's been pestering me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My favorite star? ...I guess I'd go with Spica.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spica—a wondrous star that shines with a brilliant
blue hue.
choice_data_list: Remind me... What kind of star is Spica again?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm, I think it's...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's a first-magnitude star in the Virgo
constellation.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It forms the Spring Triangle with the stars
Denebola and Arcturus.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I've always thought the names Spica
and Suzuka were kind of similar, so...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was... half joking. I just feel a sort of affinity
toward it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Although, it's less the stars themselves... and
more like I love admiring the scenery alone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My hometown gets a lot of snowfall—an
overwhelming amount, actually—and all the
scenery gets tinged in white.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The snow flattens all the sounds of the town, and
the only thing you can hear is your own
heartbeat.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm alone in a silent, pure white world.
That's the landscape you'd see if you looked into
my heart.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't had as many opportunities to be
alone since coming here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know how you feel... Everyone here is incredibly
noisy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've always preferred to be alone, but
everybody's... There are just so many people
around me all the time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I arrived at the academy, everyone's
been pestering me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, Doto, Urara... Even Top Road and
Curren.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All of them... They're so bothersome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't even need to ask whether she truly means
all that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't even need to ask whether she truly means
all that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In contrast to the coldness of her words, I sense a
warmth in her voice, like something trickling out
from deep within her heart.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It seems neither of us can afford to stay as we
are, can we, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's really an awful lot of busybodies at this
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The stars shine brightly in the clear sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as constellations tie the stars together, so
too are people connected by the bonds they
forge with one another.
